// Fibonacci with memoization const cache = new Map(); function fib(n) { if (n < 2) return n; if (cache.has(n)) return cache.get(n); const value = fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2); cache.set(n, value); return value; } /* Print the first 10 numbers */ for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { console.log(`fib(${i}) = ${fib(i)}`); }
